content.text: I’ll locate the existing autofill/CDP-related implementation and tests so I can add a focused regression test before changing the API.

I found the existing autofill API is limited to `creditCard` and directly maps it to the CDP `card` parameter. I’m checking the generated protocol types now to see the exact `Autofill.trigger` shape available in this repo.

- Ran:

```bash
npm run build --workspace puppeteer-core
```
